pets.restrictions: Only commonly recognized household pets permitted; no animals, birds, or fowl of other types. Maximum of 4 household pets per unit at any one time.

rentals.restrictions: Document does not contain explicit rental/leasing restrictions. Board Rules and Regulations may impose additional limits.

dues.notes: Initial maximum annual regular assessment: $1,200 per Subdivision Interest. Board sets the annual assessment each year. Special assessments subject to CA Civil Code §1366. Reserve fund maintained separately; inter-fund transfers allowed temporarily.

parking.restrictions: No Commercial Vehicles (those displaying business advertising) or Recreational Vehicles (motorhomes, trailers, boats, campers) on subdivision interest or street except: loading/unloading ≤48 hours per 7-day period; visiting guests with Board written consent; or in designated RV spaces if provided. No vehicle repair/servicing visible from adjacent property. No car washing on streets or driveways. Streets must be clear during scheduled street cleaning.

architectural_control: Architectural Review Committee (ARC) appointed by the Board. Approval required before any improvements: buildings, fences, walls, pools, spas, ponds, fountains, landscaping, stonework, concrete work, mechanical/plumbing/electrical, awnings, patio covers. Brush Management Zone One restrictions apply to combustible structures.
amendment_vote_threshold: 67% of voting power for standard amendments; 75% of voting power for material/Declaration amendments (Article XI, Section 2 & 3). Court-order reduction of threshold is permitted under CA Civil Code §1356.
notes: Binding arbitration clause per Federal Arbitration Act (Article IX, Section 2) — waives jury right. Association located within Multiple Habitat Planning Area (MHPA) with native plant/wildlife covenants. Recorded by First American Title, San Diego County Recorder Doc #2003-603E.
